remaining_tasks.name: Confirm horizontal + vertical layout fixes pass live Nuke UAT

blockers.description: Live Nuke UAT required — user reported horizontal still broken and vertical broken again; second fix (15d84a5) committed but not yet confirmed

human_actions_pending.action: Test Layout Selected Horizontal with frozen nodes in Nuke
human_actions_pending.context: Fix committed as 15d84a5 — spine_set now includes all freeze members so walk continues through them; offset restoration moves non-root members to relative positions after placement

human_actions_pending.action: Test Layout Selected (vertical) with frozen nodes in Nuke
human_actions_pending.context: User reported vertical regression after first bad horizontal fix; second fix should resolve

decisions.decision: Freeze blocks must move during layout (not stay anchored)
decisions.rationale: User explicitly confirmed: blocks are supposed to translate as a unit; only relative intra-block positions must be preserved

decisions.decision: Type mismatch in layout_selected: node_filter -= freeze_excluded_ids is a no-op
decisions.rationale: set[Node] - set[int] is always empty in Python; fix is set comprehension using id() comparison

decisions.decision: Horizontal layout spine_set must include all freeze members
decisions.rationale: Excluding non-root members breaks spine walk when they sit in the input(0) chain; offset restoration handles final positioning

next_action: Ask user to re-test horizontal and vertical layout with frozen nodes in a fresh Nuke session. If both pass, ask about push to remote.
context_notes: Phase 16 is the final phase of v1.3 Freeze Layout milestone. All planned work verified in CI (335/335 tests). Only live Nuke confirmation remains. The freeze integration pattern is consistent across layout_upstream, layout_selected, and _layout_selected_horizontal_impl.
